templates.template:
Actions
    XF1 Migration

{{ phrase('blacktea_steamauth_list_users') }} .dataList-cell.dataList-cell--image img { margin-right: 8px; }
{{ phrase('no_items_have_been_created_yet') }}
{$connectedAccounts.{$item.user_id}.provider_key}
{{ display_totals($items, $total) }}

{{ phrase('blacktea_steamauth_support') }}
If you are having trouble with the add-on, please refrain from asking for support on the discussion thread itself. Troubleshooting can involve sensitive information and other things that are not ideal for public view. Instead, we offer support via the following:
  • Discord: Join server
  • E-Mail: omar@assadi.co.il
  • Slack: Join server
  • Private Message: https://xenforo.com/community/conversations/add?to=Assadi,^Alex,dubwub
To aid the support request, please provide a data export using the form below:

<xf:textboxrow name="options[client_id]" value="{$options.client_id}" label="{{ phrase('Domain Name') }}" hint="{{ phrase('required') }}" explain="{{ phrase('con_acc_steam_domain_explain') }}" /> <xf:textboxrow name="options[client_secret]" value="{$options.client_secret}" label="{{ phrase('API Key') }}" hint="{{ phrase('required') }}" explain="{{ phrase('con_acc_steam_apikey_explain') }}" />

<xf:if is="!$providerData"> <xf:macro template="connected_account_provider_test_macros" name="explain" arg-providerTitle="{$provider.title}" arg-keyName="{{ phrase('app_id') }}" arg-keyValue="{$provider.options.app_id}" /> <xf:else /> <xf:macro template="connected_account_provider_test_macros" name="success" /> <xf:macro template="connected_account_provider_test_macros" name="display_name" arg-name="{$providerData.username}" /> <xf:macro template="connected_account_provider_test_macros" name="picture" arg-url="{$providerData.avatar_url}" /> </xf:if>

<xf:radiorow name="{$inputName}" value="{$option.option_value}" hint="{$hintHtml}" explain="{$explainHtml}" html="{$listedHtml}"> <xf:option value="0" label="{{ phrase('blacktea_steamauth_no_banner') }}" /> <xf:option value="1" label="{{ phrase('blacktea_steamauth_banner_above') }}" /> <xf:option value="2" label="{{ phrase('blacktea_steamauth_banner_below') }}" /> </xf:radiorow>

{{ phrase('blacktea_steamauth_active_games') }}
{{$game.label}}
    • {{$game.url}}
{{ phrase('blacktea_steamauth_recent_hours') }}
{{$game.playtime_formatted}} {{ phrase('blacktea_steamauth_hours') }}
{{ phrase('blacktea_steamauth_no_active_games') }}

{{ phrase('blacktea_steamauth_active_players') }}
{$users.{$userPlaytime.user_id}.username}
    • {$userPlaytime.provider_key}
{{ phrase('blacktea_steamauth_recent_hours') }}
{$userPlaytime.recent_hours_formatted} {{ phrase('blacktea_steamauth_hours') }}
{{ phrase('blacktea_steamauth_last_updated') }}
{{ phrase('blacktea_steamauth_no_active_players') }}

<xf:if is="can_change_steam_profile_privacy()"> <dl class="inputLabelPair"> <dt>{{ phrase('allow_view_steam') }}:</dt> <dd> <xf:select name="privacy[allow_view_steam]" value="{$xf.visitor.Privacy.allow_view_steam}"> <xf:option value="everyone">{{ phrase('all_visitors') }}</xf:option> <xf:option value="members">{{ phrase('members_only') }}</xf:option> <xf:option value="none">{{ phrase('nobody') }}</xf:option> </xf:select> </dd> </dl> </xf:if> <xf:if is="can_change_steam_banner_privacy()"> <dl class="inputLabelPair"> <dt>{{ phrase('allow_view_steam_banner') }}:</dt> <dd> <xf:select name="privacy[allow_view_steam_banner]" value="{$xf.visitor.Privacy.allow_view_steam_banner}"> <xf:option value="everyone">{{ phrase('all_visitors') }}</xf:option> <xf:option value="members">{{ phrase('members_only') }}</xf:option> <xf:option value="none">{{ phrase('nobody') }}</xf:option> </xf:select> </dd> </dl> </xf:if>

{{ phrase('blacktea_steamauth_owned_games') }}
{{$game.label}}
    • {{$game.url}}
{{ phrase('blacktea_steamauth_total') }}
{{$game.user_count}} {{ phrase('blacktea_steamauth_users') }}
{{ phrase('blacktea_steamauth_total') }}

{{ phrase('blacktea_steamauth_played_games') }}
{{$game.label}}
    • {{$game.url}}
{{ phrase('blacktea_steamauth_total_hours') }}
{{$game.playtime_formatted}} {{ phrase('blacktea_steamauth_hours') }}
{{ phrase('blacktea_steamauth_no_played_games') }}
